partial_reason: Wiki search index rebuild succeeded (local-only, ran in morning pass). SharePoint drift check + published .docx refresh still skipped — SharePoint MCP blocked on KMSI Step-8 even after mwinit. Needs mwinit -f.

stale_final_articles.note: Cannot compute definitively without SharePoint drift check. Wiki index local metadata flags 1 stale by modification-time heuristic.

sharepoint_drift.reason: SharePoint MCP KMSI Step-8 failure blocks sharepoint_list_files / sharepoint_read_file calls. Would fail identically to Loop MCP.

from_signals_this_run.rationale: This weekend surfaced three distinct MCP auth failure modes: Midway cookie absence (fixed with mwinit), Slack proxy 302 outage (self-recovered), KMSI Step-8 handshake change (needs mwinit -f). Agent needs a systematic diagnosis doc mapping symptoms → root cause → fix.
